topic.name: Movement record keeping
topic.description: Demo comparison of movement-related record obligations across two jurisdictions.

sources.title: Example EU instrument
sources.text: Article 10. Operators must maintain a movement register before dispatch. The competent authority may inspect the register on request.

sources.title: Example UK instrument
sources.text: Article 10. Operators must maintain a movement register before dispatch. The appropriate authority may inspect the register on request.

narrative.title: Demo divergence narrative
narrative.summary: This demo compares one proposition from each jurisdiction and records the result.

run_notes: First runnable Judit slice from file-backed input.
